name: atlassian-twg-cli
description: Atlassian Teamwork Graph plugin marketplace for Claude Code.

plugins.name: atlassian-twg-cli
plugins.description: Teamwork Graph CLI is Atlassian's agent-first interface to your entire work context: Jira issues, Confluence pages, Bitbucket PRs, along with your connected third-party data sources. Purpose-built for coding agents like Claude Code (terminal or desktop), and powered by Atlassian’s context graph. Try: "draft a Jira issue from this PR and link it to the epic." Using Claude Code in the browser? Install the Atlassian Rovo MCP plugin instead. Run /twg-setup after install to connect Atlassian Teamwork Graph CLI to Claude Code.
